title: cineraria carolinensis
intro: Cineraria carolinensis, also known as the Nootka cineraria or Carolina cineraria, is a flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Cineraria carolinensis include its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Cineraria carolinensis can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which are often used to treat a variety of health issues.
